name: Daily Draw: For Lucky
description: Daily fortune draw based on Guanyin Oracle (观音灵签). 100 complete oracle sticks with interpretations. Once per day. Triggers: 'draw', '/draw', or '帮我抽个签'.
description_cn: 每日观音灵签抽签，包含100签完整签文、解曰和典故。每天只能抽取一次。使用：'draw'、'/draw' 或 '帮我抽个签' 触发。
author: Lyandy & ColorPepper
